deals.name: Musaffa
deals.summary: Musaffa, based in New York, NY, is raising up to $1.2M by selling Class B Common Stock at $3.00/share on DealMaker. It reported $281K in revenue for its most recent fiscal year, up 64% year-over-year, with a net loss of $2.9M. Reported cash ($83K) is below its annual loss ($2.9M), so this raise materially affects its runway.
flags: Cash on hand covers less than half the most recent annual loss.
Issuer fee load: 7.5% of the amount raised plus a $2,000 monthly fee to DealMaker Securities starting 6 months after launch.

deals.name: Lost Boy Hospitality Ventures I
deals.legal: LOST BOY HOSPITALITY VENTURES I, INC.
deals.summary: Lost Boy Hospitality Ventures I, based in Miami, FL, is raising up to $5.0M by selling Class A Common Stock at $2.50/share on DealMaker. The company reported no revenue for its most recent fiscal year.
flags: Pre-revenue: no sales reported in the most recent fiscal year.
Newly formed entity with little or no operating history.
Issuer fee load: 8.5% cash commission plus a $37,500 advance setup fee and $15,000 monthly fee to DealMaker Securities.

deals.name: Social Impact Solar HoldCo
deals.summary: Social Impact Solar HoldCo, based in Lexington, KY, is raising up to $500K in loan notes on Climatize. The company reported no revenue for its most recent fiscal year; this is a project-finance vehicle for community solar developed by Edelen Renewables.
flags: Pre-revenue: no sales reported in the most recent fiscal year.
Newly formed entity with little or no operating history.
Issuer fee load: 5% origination fee plus 0.5% annual servicing fee to the portal.

deals.name: IOTTY Smart Home
deals.summary: IOTTY Smart Home, based in Westwood, NJ, is raising up to $4.3M by selling Class B Common Stock at $1.50/share on DealMaker. It reported $1.2M in revenue for its most recent fiscal year, down 50% year-over-year, with a net loss of $317K. Reported cash ($11K) is below its annual loss ($317K), so this raise materially affects its runway.
flags: Revenue declined 50% year-over-year.
Cash on hand covers less than half the most recent annual loss.
Short-term debt ($2.8M) exceeds total assets ($63K).
Issuer fee load: 8.5% cash commission plus a $5,000 setup fee and $2,000 monthly fee to DealMaker Securities.

deals.name: TOKYOPOP
deals.summary: TOKYOPOP, based in Culver City, CA, is raising up to $1.2M by selling Class B Common Stock at $5.00/share on DealMaker. It reported $16.0M in revenue for its most recent fiscal year, up 8% year-over-year, with a net loss of $998K.
flags: Swung from a $1.9M profit to a $1M loss year-over-year.
Issuer fee load: 8.5% cash commission plus a $47,500 setup fee and $12,000 monthly fee to DealMaker Securities.

deals.name: Aircar Aviation
deals.summary: Aircar Aviation, based in Dover, DE, is raising up to $5.0M by selling Class B Common Stock at $1.00/share on DealMaker. The company reported no revenue for its most recent fiscal year.
flags: Pre-revenue: no sales reported in the most recent fiscal year, eight years after incorporation.
Positive net income ($171K) despite zero revenue suggests a one-off accounting item — read the full Form C.
Issuer fee load: 8.5% cash commission plus a $38,500 setup fee and $15,000 monthly fee to DealMaker Securities.

deals.name: Eliaz Therapeutics
deals.summary: Eliaz Therapeutics, based in Santa Rosa, CA, is raising up to $3.0M by selling Class B Common Stock at $5.56/share on DealMaker. It reported $332K in revenue for its most recent fiscal year, up 10% year-over-year, with a net loss of $1.7M. Reported cash ($1.8M) roughly covers one year of losses at the current burn rate.
flags: Long-term debt ($8.0M) far exceeds total assets ($2.6M).
Clinical-stage: outcome depends on regulatory and clinical milestones.
Issuer fee load: 8.5% cash commission plus a $38,000 fee and $15,000 monthly fee to DealMaker Securities.

deals.name: Moon Five Technologies
deals.summary: Moon Five Technologies, based in Berkeley, CA, is raising up to $300K in loan notes on Climatize. It reported $79K in revenue for its most recent fiscal year — its first year with sales — with a net loss of $1.2M. Reported cash ($249K) is below its annual loss ($1.2M), so this raise materially affects its runway.
flags: Per the filing, this offering is made only to Colorado residents.
Cash on hand covers less than half the most recent annual loss.
Issuer fee load: 5% origination fee plus 0.5% annual servicing fee to the portal.
